words.example_sentence_target: मेरे पास शून्य सेब हैं।
words.example_sentence_native: I have zero apples.

words.example_sentence_target: उसने नौ आम खरीदे।
words.example_sentence_native: She bought nine mangoes.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: usne nau aam kharide.

words.example_sentence_target: क्रिकेट टीम में ग्यारह खिलाड़ी होते हैं।
words.example_sentence_native: There are eleven players in a cricket team.

words.example_sentence_native: There are twelve bananas in a dozen.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: ek darjan mein baarah kele hote hain.

words.example_sentence_target: वह तेरह साल का है।
words.example_sentence_native: He is thirteen years old.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: vah terah saal ka hai.

words.example_sentence_native: Today is the fourteenth.

words.example_sentence_target: मैंने पंद्रह मिनट इंतजार किया।
words.example_sentence_native: I waited for fifteen minutes.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: maine pandrah minute intazaar kiya.

words.example_sentence_target: वह सोलह साल की है।
words.example_sentence_native: She is sixteen years old.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: vah solah saal ki hai.

words.example_sentence_target: कमरे में सत्रह लोग थे।
words.example_sentence_native: There were seventeen people in the room.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: kamre mein satrah log the.

words.example_sentence_target: यह फिल्म अठारह साल से ऊपर के लोगों के लिए है।

words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah film athaarah saal se upar ke logon ke liye hai.

words.example_sentence_target: उसने उन्नीसवीं मंजिल पर एक अपार्टमेंट खरीदा।

words.example_sentence_native: There are twenty students in this class.

words.example_sentence_phonetic: ek ghante mein saath minute hote hain.

words.example_sentence_target: मेरे दादाजी सत्तर साल के हैं।

words.example_sentence_target: उसने परीक्षा में अस्सी अंक प्राप्त किए।

words.example_sentence_target: यह रास्ता नब्बे किलोमीटर लंबा है।

words.example_sentence_target: मेरे पास सौ रुपये हैं।
words.example_sentence_native: I have one hundred rupees.

days.title: Large Numbers

words.example_sentence_target: इस शहर में एक हज़ार लोग रहते हैं।
words.example_sentence_native: One thousand people live in this city.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: is shahar mein ek hazaar log rehte hain.

words.example_sentence_target: उसने एक लाख रुपये दान किए।
words.example_sentence_native: He donated one hundred thousand rupees.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: usne ek laakh rupaye daan kiye.

words.example_sentence_target: भारत की आबादी एक सौ तीस करोड़ से अधिक है।
words.example_sentence_native: The population of India is more than one hundred thirty crore.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: bharat ki aabadi ek sau tees karor se adhik hai.

days.cultural_note: In India, and other South Asian countries, large numbers are grouped differently. Instead of 'millions' and 'billions', they use 'lakhs' (100,000) and 'crores' (10,000,000).
